title: Rapid fluorescence imaging of human hepatocellular carcinoma using the β-galactosidase-activatable fluorescence probe SPiDER-βGal.
author: Ogawa S Kubo H Murayama Y Kubota T Yubakami M Matsumoto T Yamamoto Y Morimura R Ikoma H Okamoto K Kamiya M Urano Y Otsuji E
content: S-EPMC8429424 PMC8429424 Rapid fluorescence imaging of human hepatocellular carcinoma using the β-galactosidase-activatable fluorescence probe SPiDER-βGal. Fluorescence imaging of tumours facilitates rapid intraoperative diagnosis. Thus far, a promising activatable fluorescence probe
